nasb.text: O God, when You went forth before Your people, When You marched through the wilderness, Selah.

esv.text: O God, when you went out before your people, when you marched through the wilderness, Selah

cnv.text: 神啊！你領著你的子民出來， 走過曠野的時候，

ccb.text: 上帝啊， 你曾带领你的子民走过荒野。（细拉）

csbs.text: 神哪，你走在你子民的前头， 在旷野前进；细拉
